ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the program */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program (public, private, unlisted) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program */,
  "in_time" TEXT /* Total time the program has been on-air */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the program belongs to */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the program */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the program was updated */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the program is recurring */,
  "recurring_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the recurring program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the category was updated */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the content provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content provider */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the provider was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_categories" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_providers" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (administrator, content creator, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_programs" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the program was accessed */,
  "duration_watched" TEXT /* Duration the user watched the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "program_id", "access_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_metadata" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., description, image, trailer) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata (e.g., image, video, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "metadata_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the channel was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)
